name: Pig Lickin' Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Pkg. Duncan Hines butter cake mix
1 Pkg. instant vanilla pudding mix (5 oz.)
1 Can crushed pineapple with juice (1 lb. 4 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat cake mix, eggs, oil, and orange juice in a large bowl until well combined.
2. Add vanilla extract to the mixture and stir until incorporated.
3. Fold in diced oranges and continue beating until the pieces are small, about 3 minutes.
4. Grease and flour a 9 x 13-inch baking pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until set.
6. To make topping: In a separate bowl, mix together the pineapple juice, pudding mix, powdered sugar, Cool Whip, and crushed pineapple. Stir well after each addition.
7. Once the cake is baked and cooled slightly, spread the mixture evenly over the top of the cake.
8. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Note: This recipe is often called "pig licking cake" because it's so delicious that people might eat an entire serving in one sitting.
